content.situation: 你和一位好久没见的同事在咖啡店偶遇，他笑着问你最近过得怎么样。
content.speakerText: Hey! Long time no see! How've you been?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿！好久不见！最近怎么样？

options.text: I'm fine, thanks. How about you?
Not bad! I started running last month—finally got fit!
I'm working at a new company now.
I don't know. I haven't checked my calendar.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Not bad! I started running last month—finally got fit!' 符合地道口语表达，既回应了近况，又自然带出生活变化，符合 'not bad' + 具体更新的模式。干扰项1过于正式生硬，像问卷回答；干扰项3只陈述事实，未回应 'how've you been' 的情感询问；干扰项4完全答非所问，不合逻辑。

content.situation: 你和朋友在微信上聊天，她发来消息问你最近有什么新鲜事。
content.speakerTextCn: 你最近有什么新鲜事吗？

options.text: Nothing much, just working and binge-watching Netflix!
I need to buy a new phone.
Can you send me your number again?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Nothing much, just working and binge-watching Netflix!' 使用了口语中非常自然的 'nothing much' + 'just...' 结构，符合高频回应模式，轻松真实。干扰项1是无关事实；干扰项3是计划而非近况更新；干扰项4完全偏离问题，属于信息请求，答非所问。

content.situation: 你和邻居在电梯里碰面，他随口问你最近生活怎么样。
content.speakerText: How's everything going on your end?

options.text: I'm studying for my PhD next year.
Same old! The kids are growing fast, and coffee is my best friend.
I think the elevator is broken.
Could you hold the door for me?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Same old! The kids are growing fast, and coffee is my best friend.' 使用地道表达 'same old' 回应近况，并用幽默细节补充，符合轻松社交语境。干扰项1是未来计划，非当前状态；干扰项3是抱怨电梯，偏离主题；干扰项4是请求帮助，完全无关。
